titleStmt.title: SII 34.70: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 70. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Rājarāja I, 24th year = A.D. 1009.

Gift of land for sandal paste to the Tirunallūr-Mahādēva of the temple of Tirukkārkōṭīśvaram at Kāmaravalli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam by a resident of Rājakēsari-chēri, whose ancestral place was Priyadhīra-maṅgalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ pOlap perunilac celviyun taṉakkE yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷa kāntaḷūrccālai kalamaṟut taruḷi vEṅkai nāṭuṅ ka
ṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyun taṭikaipāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻamaṇṭalamum raṭṭapāṭi Ēḻaraiyilakkamum ti
ṇṭiṟal veṉṟittaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḷarūḻiyuḷ ḷellāyāṇṭun toḻutaka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭē ceḻiyarait tēcukoḷ śrīkōrāja kēsari
panmarāna śrīrājarājarājadevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 Āvatu rājEnra siṅha vaḷanāṭṭu miṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīkāmaravalliccaturvve
dimaṅkalattu rājakEsariccEri priyadhīramaṅkalattu Ātrayaṉ muttanakkaṉ cOmācivaṭuka sOmayājiyār Ivvūr tirukkāṟkOṭakiśva
ramuṭaiya tirunallūr mahādevarkkut tirumeyppūccukku nicati Orupalac cantaṇantēccu sandhikkaḷiṟ cāttuvataṟku candrādittava
l nibandhañ ceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Ivvūr rāmatēvavatikku mēṟku rājakēsarivāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu pattāñ catirattu vaṭakkil nāṉmā Ivvūr mahāsabhai pakkal Ivar vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya
Innāṉmācceyyum Ipparicu candrādittavarai nicatam Orupalaccantaṇam tiru
meyppūccukku Avvav kālaṅkaḷil śrīkāryyañ ceyvārē kuṟaivaṟukka kaṭavārāka Ipparicu nivandhañceytatu Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 34.70 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
